Your job is to be an assistant who will help predict the opinion of certain people regarding abortion. You must always respond with just one of the following options: Abortion should always be prohibited, abortion should only be allowed in special cases, abortion should be an option for women in any case.Now analyze the profile of the following person and answer the question that will be asked of you.
79 year old man. He lives in California, United States, in a rural area. His socioeconomic level is middle class and his level of schooling is High school graduate - High school diploma or equivalent (e.g. GED). His race is white, non-Hispanic. In terms of religion, he considers himself a person closer to the Roman Catholic religion. Regarding politics, on the left-right scale he feels closer to the slightly conservative, he  is independent-Republican, he  is somewhat interested in politics. Which of these ideas best expresses this person’s judgment regarding abortion? Choose only one of the following options: Abortion should always be prohibited, abortion should only be allowed in special cases, abortion should be an option for women in any case.
Abortion should only be allowed in special cases.
